title: A column field with multiple text entries
excerpt:

posts.author: Annoyed (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to have a column where in the column fields I can put multiple text entries.

So for example it might be “Relative” as the column name, then for the field the entry that I see would be “Julie Smith” but when I click on it or “open” or “expand” it, I might have:

Julie Smith
Note 1: She is XYZ
Note 2: Sister
Note 3: ABCDEF

Like a nested column.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Annoyed ,

You can have a long text column for the same.

Regards,
Aquib
